article.title: UBER interview
article.content:
Hi.
I was interviewed (phone screening) for an Uber L4 role. After the interview, the recruiter told me that I had cleared that round and that they would give me the next steps. After 3 days, I sent a follow-up email, but they are not responding. Could anyone tell me if this is common with the Uber interview process?
Thanks.

post.content: can you tell what was the question asked please.
Could you please tell interview question are from Uber tagged leetcode? and any other details about your experience ?

Wait a bit longer and try reaching out again. Sometimes recruiters get swamped. I've been using PracHub lately, and their question bank is really close to what recruiters actually ask. It might help keep you sharp for the next steps. Good luck!
It took 2–3 weeks for me to get the offer. So, you're good.
